docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,300.00 FILED BY YOUNIS, ZAFER AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED JAN-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WILSON CONSTANTINE IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO SEP-14-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNIS, ZAFER AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNIS, ZAFER AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR 27, 2018 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR 27, 2018 BY JUDGE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNIS, ZAFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON $8,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,440.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, TRUE & CORRECT ADDRESS - REQUESTING COURT UPDATE IN SYSTEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNIS, ZAFER
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF ZAFER YOUNIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 03/29/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO TO FORWARD."
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $240.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (FILED AT REQUEST OF LITIGANT: 180 DAY RULE) FILED BY DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON HEARING SET FOR AUG-30-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNIS, ZAFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140.00, $0, BUT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RETAIN MONIES THAT HE PREVIOUSLY OBTAINED TO SATISFY THE JUDGMENT DATED MAR 27, 2018 AND PURSUANT TO THE WRIT OF EXECUTION DATED JULY 11, 2018. AFTER THE MAR 27 JUDGMENT WAS VACATED, THE COURT REHEARD THE CASE ON SEPT. 14, 2018 AND PLAINTIFF PROVED HIS CLAIM AND IS ENTITLED TO RETAIN THE MONIES. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $8,759.31 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 7/11/2018. AS TO DEFENDANT CONSTANTINE, WILSON
